displayTitle: The Document Stack: Code, Standard, Spec, Procedure

beats.narration: Every visual test answers a question someone else wrote down first. Here's the document stack that governs how you look and what passes.

payload.title: THE DOCUMENT STACK
payload.sub: Law to work instruction — the paper trail that governs every examination.

beats.narration: The code is the job's law. Standards say how the task is done. The spec tailors one contract. The procedure is your work instruction.
Stack them: law on top, then code, standard, specification, and your procedure at the bottom. Requirements flow down this stack — never up.
When invoked documents disagree, the contract states the order of precedence. A conflict is a documented question to your Level Three — never a guess.
When the paper disagrees, you don't guess. You raise it — and you work to the documented answer.

payload.sub: Work to the documented answer — never a workbench guess.
